questions.question: Why must the CrossChainSwapper contract approve the Router before calling requestCrossChainSwap?
options: The Router needs permission to transfer the locked tokens from the swapper contract
questions.correctAnswer: The Router needs permission to transfer the locked tokens from the swapper contract

questions.question: What is the total amount of tokens that must be locked on the source chain?
options: The swap amount plus the solver fee
The swap amount plus the network fee
The swap amount plus both solver and network fees
questions.correctAnswer: The swap amount plus the solver fee

questions.question: The same private key will generate the same address on both Base Sepolia and Avalanche Fuji.
What does the requestCrossChainSwap function return?
options: A unique request ID for tracking the swap
questions.correctAnswer: A unique request ID for tracking the swap

questions.question: To check if a swap has been executed, you can call the ______ function with the request ID.
If a swap stays pending for a long time, what is the most likely reason?
options: The smart contract has a bug
The solver fee is too low to attract Solvers
questions.correctAnswer: The solver fee is too low to attract Solvers

questions.question: The tokens received on the destination chain are wrapped versions issued by only swaps.
